description: Free tool that enumerates system-wide hotkeys (RegisterHotKey) and detects which application responds to each one.
notes: For UIAccess (detecting hotkeys owned by elevated apps), copy hkscr64.exe and hkscr64.dll into a %ProgramFiles% directory (e.g. C:\Program Files\Hotkey Screener) and run from there. The Scoop install dir under %USERPROFILE% does not satisfy UIAccess requirements.
Be careful: 'Detect application' emulates a hotkey press, so save your work first.
